$schema: Exceptions file for guards/check-security.ts. Each exception needs reason, reviewer, and expiry (max ~30 days).

exceptions.reason: Transitive dev dependency via Vite/Expo tooling. esbuild binary integrity issue affects Deno module path only — Bun/npm install path unaffected. Tracked for upstream bump.
Transitive dependency (axios/mail tooling). CRLF injection in multipart field names — no direct usage of affected API surface in Kumiko code paths.
Transitive dev dependency. Windows server.fs.deny bypass — Kumiko dev servers run on macOS/Linux in CI and prod.
